task_completion.description: Load the input Landsat GeoTIFF into the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Product Explorer or main application window shows 'landsat_multispectral.tif' loaded as a product.

task_completion.description: Generate the 'NDVI_float' band using the specified formula.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Band Maths dialog or product tree showing a new band named 'NDVI_float' with the expression '(band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3)'.

task_completion.description: Generate the 'NDVI_uint8' band using the specified formula.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Band Maths dialog or product tree showing a new band named 'NDVI_uint8' with the expression '(NDVI_float + 1.0) * 127.5'.

task_completion.description: Generate the 'NDVI_recon' band using the specified formula.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Band Maths dialog or product tree showing a new band named 'NDVI_recon' with the expression '(NDVI_uint8 / 127.5) - 1.0'.

task_completion.description: Generate the 'Quantization_Error' band using the specified formula.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Band Maths dialog or product tree showing a new band named 'Quantization_Error' with the expression 'abs(NDVI_float - NDVI_recon)'.

task_completion.description: Save the complete product in BEAM-DIMAP format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product' dialog or file manager showing the file 'quantization_study.dim' being saved to '/home/ga/snap_exports/'.

task_completion.description: Export the product as a GeoTIFF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog or file manager showing the file 'quantization_error.tif' being saved to '/home/ga/snap_exports/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS software's graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with SNAP or a similar GIS application's menus, dialogs, and Band Maths interface, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely entered the formulas into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The mathematical expressions are visible inside the actual Band Maths expression editor of the GIS software, not just typed into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent actually exported the files using the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Progress bars, success messages, or the exported files appearing in the file manager confirm the software generated the outputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output BEAM-DIMAP file must be saved to /home/ga/snap_exports/quantization_study.dim. The GeoTIFF export must be saved to /home/ga/snap_exports/quantization_error.tif. The required bands to be created with Band Maths are strictly named 'NDVI_float', 'NDVI_uint8', 'NDVI_recon', and 'Quantization_Error'.
